themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 11 verses. Commentary leans on "In the six and thirtieth year of the reign of Asa Baasha king of Israel came up against Judah...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And they buried him in his own sepulchres, which he had made for himself in the city of David...". Word-study detail reinforces "הָאָ֙רֶץ֙: throughout the whole earth - the earth (at large, or partitively a land)".
